item.title: We hear a lot about the poverty draft, but if you listen to what people are saying that does not represent the major majority of...
item.description:
We hear a lot about the poverty draft, but if you listen to what people are saying that does not represent the major majority of those targeted - primarily because education is necessary, and we have such a unequal education that even the military is not a good social ladder if you are at the very bottom#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Retrenching beauty standards is not good - tho let me be clear, as long as women are expected to do this you obviously have an o...
item.description:
Retrenching beauty standards is not good - tho let me be clear, as long as women are expected to do this you obviously have an obligation to not fail on your implicit reciprocal duty



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: They are proud of their work so proud that they have to cover their faces on official propaganda because they are scared that th...
item.description:
They are proud of their work so proud that they have to cover their faces on official propaganda because they are scared that the people that recognise their work for what it is won’t like them#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.description:
Pls follow @Global Sumud Flotilla for more updates, and share all news you see on , they think if they do it early enough they can shut down attention

item.title: April 29, 7 EST, the Orrs of the Flotilla are reporting that the IDF is approaching and intercepting it ships attempting to brin...
item.description:
April 29, 7 EST, the Orrs of the Flotilla are reporting that the IDF is approaching and intercepting it ships attempting to bring life-saving aid to Gaza and are jamming their communications and sending threatening radio messages



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
